title: clermontia waimeae
intro: Clermontia waimeae, also known as the Ma'o or Haha, is a species of flowering plant in the bellflower family native to Hawaii. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clermontia waimeae include treating skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as having antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. Clermontia waimeae can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Hawaiian medicine as a poultice or salve to treat various health conditions.
